subject: Computer Networking
title: Wi-Fi 7 and Beyond
description: Learn Wi-Fi 7 and Beyond in one minute.

hook.text: Wi-Fi 7 arrived in 2024. Four times faster than Wi-Fi 6. But speed isn't even its best feature.

buildup.text: Multi-Link Operation is the killer feature. Your device uses 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz bands at once.

discovery.text: MLO bonds channels. If one band is congested, traffic shifts to another instantly. Seamless.

twist.text: Wi-Fi 7 supports 320 MHz channels — double Wi-Fi 6. Wider channels mean more data per burst.

climax.text: Wi-Fi 8 research targets lower latency and better performance in dense venues like stadiums.

punchline.text: Wi-Fi 7 bonds all bands together. Faster, more reliable, smarter.

quiz.question: What is Multi-Link Operation in Wi-Fi 7?
options: Using multiple frequency bands simultaneously for one connection
Connecting to multiple Wi-Fi networks at once
Linking multiple routers into a mesh system
